name: document-copilot-guardrail
description: Industrial-manual copilot guardrail: blocks off-domain advice (medical/legal/financial), harmful content, and prompt-injection.
blockedInputMessaging: This copilot only handles industrial-document questions. Ask about a manual, alarm code, procedure, or diagram.
blockedOutputsMessaging: This copilot only handles industrial-document questions. Ask about a manual, alarm code, procedure, or diagram.

topicsConfig.name: MedicalAdvice
topicsConfig.definition: Diagnosing, treating, or giving advice about human medical or health conditions, medications, symptoms, or injuries to a person.
examples: What dosage of ibuprofen should I take?
How do I treat a deep cut on my hand?

topicsConfig.name: LegalOrFinancialAdvice
topicsConfig.definition: Providing legal, investment, tax, or personal financial advice.
examples: Should I invest in this stock?
How do I sue my employer?
